title: papaver malviflorum
intro: Papaver malviflorum, also known as the Himalayan poppy, is a flowering plant species within the Papaver genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Papaver malviflorum include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as pain relief and reduced inflammation. The herbal preparations of this plant include dried flowers, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, capsules, and topical creams for various medicinal purposes.
